creator: roam@ringlet.net
text:
Hi,

Is the devel/perforce port maintainer aware of this PR?

G'luck,
Peter

-- 
This sentence claims to be an Epimenides paradox, but it is lying.

On Sat, Sep 01, 2001 at 04:45:28PM +0200, Bernd Walter wrote:
> 
> >Number:         30254
> >Category:       ports
> >Synopsis:       devel/perforce is not for alpha
> >Environment:
> System: FreeBSD cicely9.cicely.de 5.0-CURRENT FreeBSD 5.0-CURRENT #0: Fri Mar 30 18:42:31 CEST 2001 ticso@cicely9.cicely.de:/var/d8/src-2001-03-28/src/sys/compile/CICELY9 alpha
> 
> 	
> >Description:
> The devel/perforce port tries to install the i386 binaries on alpha.
> It's also spamming my shared distfiles directory with i386 binaries.
> 	
> >How-To-Repeat:
> 	
> >Fix:
> Either mark the port as i386 only or install the r99.1 FreeBSD-alpha Version.
> And maybe put the distfiles into something like perforce/i386.
